prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 ultra-detailed anime fantasy illustration of a delicate miniature aqua dome containing the world of Nozomu. Inside a clear oval glass cloche on an ornate white-and-gold base, place exactly 1 young magical-girl knight as the central subject, exactly 1 oversized silver broadsword held upright in front of her, exactly 1 ornate oval name plaque at the bottom, exactly 2 slender gold candle stands, and exactly 1 arched cathedral-like background window. The character has pale golden blonde long voluminous twin-tail hair, a wreath of small white flowers with pale blue and blush pink blossoms, a soft pearl-white and translucent pale-blue dress with layered ruffled skirt, floral corsage belt, arm garlands, white gloves, and silver-gold filigree armor accents. Her face is intentionally covered by a flat skin-toned rectangular blank mask with no facial features, centered over the face. The sword is elegant and ceremonial, with a long satin-silver blade, gold cross ornaments, dangling chains, and a bouquet of pale blue roses and white flowers wrapped around the hilt. Fill the dome with an ethereal sanctuary garden: abundant white blossoms, pale blue roses, pearly petals, tiny white butterflies, crystal droplets, sparkling beads, soft hanging ornaments, and dreamy bokeh lights. The plaque should display のぞむの花の聖域 / のぞむ in delicate gold lettering. Use a luminous pastel palette of ivory, silver, champagne gold, pale blue, blush pink, and transparent glass highlights. Style: high-end Japanese anime figure illustration, ornate shoujo fantasy, soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, glossy glass reflections, intricate floral details, magical aquarium-dome atmosphere, no watermark, no extra characters, no modern objects.
